unresolved_issues: Entrepreneur payoff and loan-return integrals need targeted source review because MinerU OCR around Appendix A.4 is fragile.
Bank and entrepreneur net-worth shocks are source-stated but not retained in the final Rep-MMB shocks block.
Variable-utilization calibration parameter c_U is implementation-supplied rather than fully documented in the paper text.
Steady-state contract terms are reconstructed from calibration targets and implementation constants, not from a complete paper-side closed-form derivation.

shared_indexes.reason: User explicitly forbade editing shared indexes and limited ownership to the NK_RA16 folder.
